title: November 2025 Cavallo Newsletter
text: Enjoy Your Latest Cavallo News - Full of Hoof-Saving Hacks & Tips to Keep your Horse Brilliantly Booted! Meet Your New Favourite Upgrade: Say Hello to the Trek/Trek Pro/BFB Colour Pop Straps Pack! Mix. Match. Make Those Boots YOURS! Is your horse a true individual? Elevate your Cavallo Trek, Trek Pro or BFB Hoof Boots with the Colour Pop Straps Pack! This pack is a vibrant collection of 3 pairs of durable hoof boot straps in hunter orange, bright yellow and turquoise. Trek/Trek Pro/BFB Colour Pop straps let you switch up your horse’s look in seconds! Whether you’re hitting the trails, competing, or just out for a ride, these colourful straps not only look great, but help provide a secure fit to keep your boots in place, no matter the terrain. Have multiple horses, or different-sized fronts & backs? Tell your boots apart at a glance! Meet Your Colour Pop Strap Pack! title: September 2025 Cavallo Newsletter
text: Enjoy Your Latest Cavallo News - Full of Hoof-Saving Hacks & Tips to Keep your Horse Brilliantly Booted! RBC Women of Influence Innovation Award Finalist: Carole Herder and Her Commitment to Equine Care Big news from our Cavallo family! Our very own Carole Herder, President of Cavallo, has been named an Official Regional Finalist for the RBC Canadian Innovation Award ?—one of only THREE RBC Canadian Women Entrepreneur Awards finalists from across the entire country! The winner will be revealed at the Gala in Toronto on Friday, November 14th. Carole’s journey is nothing short of inspiring: She has dedicated her life to improving the comfort and well-being of horses worldwide by pioneering the development of Cavallo Hoof Boots, an innovation that has revolutionized the way horses are ridden, rehabilitated, and cared for globally. An accomplished author and speaker, Carole has educated thousands of riders on natural horse care. She’s built Cavallo from the ground up into an internationally respected brand that blends compassion with cutting-edge innovation. Please join us in cheering Carole on! We’re proud, inspired, and grateful to have her leading Cavallo into the future! A "Howling Good Time" Was Had By All! ? Last week, Team Cavallo dove headfirst into a staff workshop extravaganza! ? Sure, there was some serious business—lots of brainstorming and plotting new ways to make lif

title: October 2024 Cavallo Newsletter
h1: Hoof Boots Fit for a Queen!
text: Welcome to Your Cavallo Newsletter! Hoof Boots Fit for a Queen! Photo credit: Fell Pony Adventures Brigitta, a Cavallo Customer Service Star, alerted us to this charming podcast by Fell Pony Adventures, in which interviewer Tom Lloyd interviews Queen Elizabeth’s former Groom, Terry Pendry! We also couldn’t help but notice that they posted this incredible photo of Queen Elizabeth’s beautiful pony, Carltonlima Emma, wearing our Cavallo Simple Hoof Boots – WOW! The FELL PONY Podcast is a two-time winner of the Best International Podcast Award at the Equus Film Festival in 2021 and 2023 and is known for its award-winning conversations with guests, including riders, drivers, breeders, judges, adventurers and beyond! Listen to the Fell Pony Podcast NOW : Listen Here! Beautiful Memories Made at Liberty Festival We are thrilled to be the naming rights sponsor for the Liberty Horse Festival. Alongside Dan James, Amber Marshall, Ben Atkinson, and more, this event epitomizes the spirit of freedom and the deep bond we share with our equine friends. What once seemed like movie magic, when we wondered, “How did they make that horse do that?” is now a reality—explained, demonstrated, and within our reach. title: July 2022 Cavallo Newsletter
text: Welcome to the "Cavallo Team" Edition of your Cavallo News Psst... You're Looking at an Enterprising "Woman of the Year" Winner! I’ve got fun news to share! Enterprising Women Magazine selects top entrepreneurs to honour at its annual celebration and conference, and I’m very excited to be included on this year’s list! As many of you know, I work to educate horse owners about the benefits of barefoot and booted riding. I was one of only five women selected in the world in my category, and I’m proud to represent the only equestrian brand awarded. I’m honoured to be considered a peer amongst the most courageous and clever women entrepreneurs in the world. As women, we must work harder and smarter and still remember to be mothers, wives, and women. I often joke with my friend that I wish I had a wife to take care of things. https://youtu.be/gB_ovOMVHuc?si=_B_-ZpLADwRjMvrK How my Past Led to my Future as Cavallo President With all the recent boot inquiries we’re getting from the rodeo crowd, I’m taking a trip down memory lane to my barrel racing days. Here’s a video of me and my horse ‘AsBadAsMyDad’ aka. Dot, kicking butt together! So much fun: When I first got Dot, we started training to barrel race. Unfortunately, she wasn’t 100% sound. Some days she’d be fine, but others she was just not quite right. I did everything in my search for answers, because this is one well-bred athlete

title: Donkey Hoof Boots Back in Stock – Cavallo LEB (Long Ear Boot)
text: They’re finally here... The only hoof boots designed specifically for donkeys! After the first shipment selling out, the Cavallo LEB (Long Ear Boot) is back in stock—just in time for trail season, rehab, and everyday protection. ✔ Designed for donkey hooves (not modified horse boots) ✔ Proven on rocky terrain, rescues, and working donkeys worldwide ✔ Secure fit that stays on—even in tough conditions ? Shop Now Before This Shipment Sells Out! Why Donkeys Need Different Boots: Donkeys are not just “small horses"... Their hooves are: Narrower and more upright Built with stronger frogs Higher heel bulbs That’s why traditional hoof boots often rub, twist, or fall off. The Cavallo LEB was built from the ground up to match donkey anatomy—supporting natural hoof movement, balance, and long-term soundness! PLUS: Introducing LEB Hoof Boot Pads - Make Every Step Feel a Little Easier for Them Cavallo LEB Donkey Hoof Boot Pads provide added comfort, protection, and shock absorption for donkeys who need extra support. Donkey hooves are living, dynamic structures that can become sore, sensitive, or stressed due to terrain, workload, health conditions, or environmental factors. These pads help reduce concussion, protect sensitive soles, and improve overall comfort in a wide range of situations. Product Features: Shock & concussion-absorbing cushioned insole Durable, flexible, and easy to clean

title: Julie Goodnight's Team Puts Cavallo Trek to the Test!
h1: Julie Goodnight's Team Puts Cavallo Trek to the Test!
text: Julie Goodnight's Team Puts Cavallo Trek to the Test! Julie Goodnight: A Dynamic Force in Horsemanship and the Saddle Julie Goodnight is a multidisciplinary rider and clinician with experience in dressage, jumping, racing, reining, colt starting, cutting, and wilderness riding. Here’s what we did with Julie Goodnight’s Cavallo Boots: Julie Goodnight’s Team is Tough on Boots! We wanted to put Cavallo Horse Hoof Boots through the toughest conditions possible. So who did we call? Julie Goodnight – one of North America’s top experts on horse equipment! In the video below , Julie Goodnight films her top rider, Melissa Arnold, to test their Cavallos. This is one steep hill, and Melissa is NOT backing down! She has no trouble galloping straight up and going right back down in her Trek Horse Hoof Boots! https://youtu.be/R2x0zwJyQdk?si=JUVRT9xXNcNHJuKp Julie's Praise for Carole Herder’s Book – There are no Horseshoes in Heaven After reading Carole Herder’s book, There Are No Horseshoes in Heaven , Julie gave this beautiful testimonial: “Carole and I share a deeply rooted passion for horses and their welfare. I applaud her ground-breaking research and her courage to think for herself and to follow her heart. This is a compelling read with pertinent, thought-provoking insights.” — Julie Goodnight

title: Cavallo News Journal - May 2026
text: The Cavallo "Keeping it Reel" Challenge! ? Carole recently handed a few members of the Cavallo team a folder full of fantastic Cavallo video clips and one creative mission: to each turn the clips into a reel that’s fun, fresh, and impossible not to watch! The catch? Everyone received the exact same footage — but each person had to bring their own personality, humour, and style to the edit. The result is three wildly different videos that perfectly capture the heart of Cavallo! Because at the end of the day, Cavallo isn’t just about hoof boots. It’s about the people, the horses, and the joy we all share along the ride. Now it’s your turn to join in! ? Watch all three “Keeping It Reel” challenge videos and cast your vote for your favourite creation by clicking the button below! We’ll reveal the winning reel — and the crowned Cavallo video champion — in our next newsletter! Enjoy! Rachel's Video: What do these horses have in common? https://www.youtube.com/shorts/0AVm41wgi-c?feature=share Jenny's Video: What's black and white and wears Cavallos? https://youtube.com/shorts/wsy0Sf9q86M?feature=share Maren's Video: Come along for an action-packed ride with us! https://youtube.com/shorts/JmaRXKu4Yg0?feature=share After watching all three, click here to vote for your favourite: Which one is your pick? title: Your Cavallo News - June 2026
text: "When you solve a real problem, people—and animals—respond quickly." - Carole Quiz Time: Is Your Horse Giving Summer Vibes or Summer Sass? What's Your Horse's Summer Hoof Personality? Summer is full of horsey fun, but it can also be full of hidden challenges. Your horse may feel great in the pasture, then suddenly get careful on gravel, hard roads, rocky trails, or sun-baked ground when you head out for a ride. This quick quiz helps you spot the little clues your horse may already be giving you! How to Play: Pick the answer that sounds most like your horse. At the end, count how many A’s, B’s, and C’s you picked to calculate your score! ? 1. You head down a gravel path. Your horse says… A. “No problem, let’s go!”? B. “I’ll go, but I’m choosing my steps.”? C. “Absolutely not. I’m walking on the soft shoulder.”? 2. On hard summer ground, your horse usually… A. Moves out happily - no changes. ?️ B. Feels a little shorter or more careful at times. ? C. Slows down, hesitates, or hugs the soft edge. ? 3. After a trim, your horse is… A. Ready to hit the trails! ? B. A bit tender for a day or two.? C. Ouchy enough that you plan around it. ? 4. Your horse lives mostly on… A. 24/7 turnout on varied footing, like pasture, dirt, gravel, and rocky, uneven terrain. ?️ B. 12-24-hour turnout daily on mostly soft footing, such as grass, sand, and loose dirt. ?️ C. <12 hours of turnout per da

title: Meet the Consteed Smart Hoof Sneaker: The Future Beneath the Hoof
text: Equine Hoof Boot Research | Consteed & Cavallo Hoof Boot Science & Biomechanics Science-Backed Innovation A 2026 peer-reviewed study in the Veterinary Journal showed that the Consteed Smart Hoof Sneaker™ —built on the Cavallo Trek Hoof Boot—can accurately measure limb loading during movement. By integrating pressure and motion sensors into the boot, researchers collected objective biomechanical data directly at the hoof, demonstrating the potential for portable, real-world monitoring of equine locomotion. Two Innovators, One Goal: Better Lives for Horses. https://www.youtube.com/shorts/lV0v0F3Mn7w?feature=share When trusted hoof protection meets intelligent movement technology, horse care takes a remarkable step forward. The partnership between Cavallo Hoof Boots and the Consteed Smart Hoof Sneaker brings together Cavallo’s proven comfort, fit and hoof-first design with Consteed’s advanced sensor-based gait analysis—giving horse owners, veterinarians, and therapists a clearer window into how a horse truly moves. Built on the Cavallo Trek Hoof Boot platform, this innovative system captures real-time hoof-force data during natural movement, providing practical insights into balance, loading, symmetry, and potential soundness concerns. For the good of the horse, it means more informed decisions, earlier awareness, and greater confidence in supporting comfort, performance, and long
